ValidationRule.description: Report Type is mandatory at "In Service" stage.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISBLANK(Platform__c), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Client_delivery_request", OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Client Delivery"), ISPICKVAL(Type,"Solvency") ), ISPICKVAL(Status, "In Service"), Report_Type__c ="" ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You need to fill the Report Type before it can be "in service"
